title: Cursor Plugin Manifest (dotnet-ai-kit)
description: Schema for .cursor-plugin/plugin.json per the official Cursor plugin docs at https://cursor.com/docs/reference/plugins (retrieved 2026-05-19) and modeled on the verified working example at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cursor/plugins/main/agent-compatibility/.cursor-plugin/plugin.json. Manifest fields are scalar relative path strings with `./` prefix (Cursor docs allow string OR array; this manifest opts into the scalar string form). The agent-bearing field is `agents` (NOT `subagents`) and the verified path is `./agents/`. Per spec A-005 / OOS-005: with the spike fixture flipped to PASS, the `agents` field is required; if a future workflow_dispatch smoke run regresses to FAIL, the `agents` field MUST be removed per cursor-fixture-decision.contract.md. Optional fields per docs: `commands`, `keywords`, `author`, `homepage`, `repository`, `license`, `logo` — the manifest currently opts into `commands` (declares the 27 slash commands explicitly) and `keywords` (marketplace discovery).

author.description: Per Cursor plugin docs: optional publisher metadata. Minimum shape is `{name}`; `email` and `url` are documented as optional sub-fields.

homepage.description: Per Cursor plugin docs: optional plugin homepage URL.

repository.description: Per Cursor plugin docs: optional source-repository URL.

license.description: Per Cursor plugin docs: optional SPDX license identifier (e.g., `MIT`, `Apache-2.0`).

logo.description: Per Cursor plugin docs: optional plugin-root-relative path (or URL) to a logo asset. Currently `./assets/logo-icon.svg`, bundled via `tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel.force-include.assets`.

keywords.description: Per Cursor plugin docs: optional discovery tags for marketplace search.

skills.description: Scalar relative path to the skills directory.

rules.description: Scalar relative path to the generated Cursor .mdc rule directory. Replaces the legacy one-blob .cursor/rules/dotnet-ai-kit.mdc behavior (research R12).

commands.description: Per Cursor plugin docs (https://cursor.com/docs/reference/plugins, retrieved 2026-05-19): scalar relative path to the slash-commands directory. Cursor's default folder discovery is `commands/`; we declare it explicitly so the manifest is self-documenting about the 27 commands shipped.

agents.description: Per cursor/plugins/agent-compatibility evidence + cursor.com/docs/reference/plugins: scalar relative path to the agents directory at the plugin root. With OOS-005 spike fixture PASS, this field is part of the v1.0 shipped contract. A future regression flips it back to absent per cursor-fixture-decision.contract.md.
